title: ECDH, X25519, and Authenticated Key Agreement · Concurrent Code Workshop
summary: A product-security pair incrementally builds authenticated X25519 key-agreement transcript, changes one attacker-controlled input, and keeps earlier Go, accessibility, secret-lifecycle, testing, and evidence invariants active. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of authenticated X25519 key-agreement transcript while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use supported ECDH curves through Go interfaces with private/public key separation, strict parsing, and shared-secret error handling.
Select X25519 or approved NIST curves from protocol, hardware, compliance, interoperability, and implementation constraints.
Feed the ECDH result and full context into a labeled KDF rather than using raw shared bytes directly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Crypto Go Ecdh Contract
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop cryptographic engineering team handles case 3604 during a credential migration window. Build deterministic Go evidence to authenticate and transcript-bind an ephemeral X25519 or approved ECDH exchange; reject toy, obsolete, unauthenticated, self-signed-trust, downgrade, and security-by-obscurity shortcuts; then change one authenticated byte and prove clean rejection without partial effect. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Crypto Go Ecdh Contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use supported ecdh curves through go interfaces with private/public key separation, strict parsing, and shared-secret error handling. For Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Crypto Go Ecdh Contract, keep Crypto Go Ecdh Contract connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
